query:
-- Find all distinct Xero contact names that might relate to Aus Ships
SELECT DISTINCT contactName, COUNT(*) as itemCount, SUM(lineAmount) as total
FROM billing_items
WHERE contactName LIKE '%Ship%' 
   OR contactName LIKE '%Marine%'
   OR contactName LIKE '%Vessel%'
   OR contactName LIKE '%Aus S%'
GROUP BY contactName
ORDER BY itemCount DESC;

-- Also check what the Xero import covered - what date range
SELECT MIN(invoiceDate) as earliest, MAX(invoiceDate) as latest, COUNT(*) as totalItems
FROM billing_items
WHERE billingPlatform = '' OR billingPlatform IS NULL;
